L.-33004/99 (Uie (Baxette of iJudia EXTRAORDINARY WT II—T3VS 3—^T-Tsni^ (ii) PART II—Section 3—Sub-section (ii) PUBLISHED BY AUTHORITY "ST. 1379] "=Tf % # , H'<WdK, ^ T 30, 2015/ 3TIW 9, 1937 No. 1379] NEW DELHI, TUESDAY, JUNE 30, 2015/ ASADHA 9 , 1937 3JJ: cH^IH-U f f^Fpft, 30 , 2015 T. . 1750( ).Ñ*TcT: c-^]i) R ^ STH £ f ^ t MIIefe TT^T t^TT 3ftdT cTIHr £ffa $ t 5TTH *TT Ud< l ^ 3 ^ £ $ cj^r UlU tfST r ^l-Mdl pHT 5rFT STpfi T ^RTfrT T cT5^ £ | 2. cT:, 5T, rFT HTH (fasta 51%^t) 2OT, 1958 (1958 ^TT 28) RT 3 ^TTT tf5^T 5 1 % ^ yifm ^ T glT, T ^ A I \i 33rT i|<H y-nl pHT, U d c ^ K I , 3cRT ?^jpt TT^T 30 , 2015 U cpfr r a d Ô 5TTH arT5TÕ qtf^RT ^ t £l [ . . 7/10/2003-lJ .f.- I] 513=3^ $, -j^d cr MINISTRY OF HOME AFFAIRS NOTIFICATION New Delhi, the 30th June, 2015 S.O. 1750(E).—Whereas the Central Government is of the opinion that the area comprised within the limits of the whole of the State of Nagaland is in such a disturbed or dangerous condition that the use of armed forces in aid of the Civil power is necessary. 2. Now, therefore, in exercise of the powers conferred by Section 3 of the Armed Forces (Special Powers) Act, 1958 (No. 28 of 1958) the Central Government hereby declares that whole of the said State to be a ‘disturbed area’ for a period of one year with effect from the 30th June, 2015 for the purpose of that Act. [F. No. 7/10/2003-NE-I] SHAMBHU SINGH, Jt.
